title: Mobile Missing Content Register
description: Records content on the source mobile view that was not in desktop nav.plain.html. Mobile-only items (extra menu items, mobile CTAs, etc.) must be added with CSS that hides them on desktop. Hook blocks until all items are resolved.

items.description: List of mobile-only content omissions. Add when Phase 4 analysis finds content on mobile that isn't in nav.plain.html. Set resolved: true when added to nav.plain.html with desktop-hidden styling.

location.description: Where on mobile (e.g. 'mobile menu drawer', 'mobile header bar', 'mobile accordion heading Products')

description.description: What is missing (e.g. 'Extra CTA button', 'Mobile-only search icon', 'Additional accordion section')

resolved.description: Set to true when added to nav.plain.html and styled to show only at mobile breakpoint

status.description: Alternative to resolved: 'pending' = not yet in nav.plain.html, 'resolved' = added with mobile-only styling
